channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-28 03:24 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Now imagine if they actually reported all of them instead of the authorities joining in.
item.description: Now imagine if they actually reported all of them instead of the authorities joining in.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only get better from here
item.description: Only get better from here

item.title: @elonmusk: Just stood 10 meters (~33 feet) from Starship today in Boca Chica. Heat tiles, flaps, the full stain...
item.description: Just stood 10 meters (~33 feet) from Starship today in Boca Chica. Heat tiles, flaps, the full stainless steel monster towering right there — insanely close. No other place on Earth lets the public get this close to real, operational spacecraft. Elon’s companies just do things differently. Open. Bold. Accessible. This is how you inspire the world — and especially the next generation. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: They are legalising the rape of europes women
item.description: They are legalising the rape of europes women

item.title: @elonmusk: 'Tesla and SpaceX are the 2 most exciting companies in the world'@elonmuskYep, and that's why I'm th...
item.description: 'Tesla and SpaceX are the 2 most exciting companies in the world'@elonmuskYep, and that's why I'm thrilled to spend a very significant amount of time, on a daily basis, studying their progress to push humanity forward. Much more than just an investment with potentially huge rewards, it's first and foremost a source of intellectual thrill. The Tesla model, and everything Elon Musk is trying to accomplish, isn't easy to grasp, and it's clearly not the superficial, sloppy, and biased work of these incompetent journalists that's unfortunately going to open the public's eyes. That's a shame... what a pity!

item.title: @elonmusk: The first Starship V3 has left the build site to begin prelaunch testing
item.description: The first Starship V3 has left the build site to begin prelaunch testing

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨🇬🇧 “Migrant Murderer plunges Knife into 9-year-old Girl” How many more innocent Children must die?
item.description: 🚨🇬🇧 “Migrant Murderer plunges Knife into 9-year-old Girl” How many more innocent Children must die?

item.title: @elonmusk: STARSHIP V3 – THE BIGGEST UPGRADE YET has left the build site for prelaunch testing. Flight 12 is ab...
item.description: STARSHIP V3 – THE BIGGEST UPGRADE YET has left the build site for prelaunch testing. Flight 12 is about to change everything Here’s what’s new: - Raptor 3 engines: 51% more thrust, lighter, simpler design (33 on booster, 6 on Ship) - Full stack ~1.5 m taller for hundreds more tons of propellant capacity - 3 grid fins (instead of 4), 50% larger, with integrated catch pins - Redesigned fuel transfer tube on Super Heavy - Fully reusable hot-stage interstage - Cleaner, denser heat shield design - First launch from upgraded Pad 2 This is the version built for orbital flights, propellant transfer, and the road to Mars

item.title: @elonmusk: Same thing happened to a friend of mine
item.description: Same thing happened to a friend of mine

item.title: @elonmusk: For the first time, almost half of our country’s 30-year-old women are childless. In 1976, it was ju...
item.description: For the first time, almost half of our country’s 30-year-old women are childless. In 1976, it was just 18 percent. A low birth rate is the number one threat to Western Civilization. Society doesn’t survive without babies.nytimes.com/2026/02/27/us/po…

item.title: @elonmusk: ChatGPT is going woke. I just wanted a number. Not a lecture.
item.description: ChatGPT is going woke. I just wanted a number. Not a lecture.

item.title: @elonmusk: Deployment of 29@Starlinksatellites confirmed
item.description: Deployment of 29@Starlinksatellites confirmed

item.title: @elonmusk: dostoevsky said if you gave people everything they wanted, cakes, entertainment and nothing to worry...
item.description: dostoevsky said if you gave people everything they wanted, cakes, entertainment and nothing to worry about except the continuation of the species, they’d start breaking things out of boredom he was right we got comfortable enough that people started manufacturing their own suffering and building identities around the invented problem, to the point where mutilation is seen as healthcare. because a life without struggle felt like a life without meaning. the idea of being broken gave them something to solve and someone to fight, an identity and a sense of community but, once the problem gets “solved” nothing changes, obviously. the emptiness was there before the “problem” (it’s always there), and it’ll be there after. the cause of the problem is never fixed these people never wanted to be fixed, they wanted to feel special

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX shares the same goal as NASA of returning to the Moon with a permanent presence as expeditiou...
item.description: SpaceX shares the same goal as NASA of returning to the Moon with a permanent presence as expeditiously and safely as possible. We look forward to working with NASA to fly missions that demonstrate valuable progress towards establishing a permanent, sustainable presence on the lunar surface. Frequent human exploration flights help establish a sustainable presence for humans in space.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨WOW:@TRobinsonNewErareveals why he released his factual documentary knowing it meant jail — and why...
item.description: 🚨WOW:@TRobinsonNewErareveals why he released his factual documentary knowing it meant jail — and why@elonmuskplatforming him on@Xmade every second of solitary confinement worth it. 💪 "I went to jail and when I called home, my son was like 'Dad! Dad! Dad!' Elon Musk shared the film! and I was like YES"

item.title: @elonmusk: These are the fruits of the Zombie Filibuster, highlighted in blue👇 The Senate’s unwavering devotion...
item.description: These are the fruits of the Zombie Filibuster, highlighted in blue👇 The Senate’s unwavering devotion to the Zombie Filibuster—and to the light-duty legislative schedule it facilitates—is what’s hindering the progress of the SAVE America Act Maintaining a light workweek for the convenience of senators isn’t a good reason not to do what it takes to pass a bill that 85% of Americans want But make no mistake—that’s a big part of what we’re dealing with here We don’t necessarily have to use the talking filibuster all of the time—or even most of the time—but we must be willing to use it when it’s necessary With the SAVE America Act, it is very, very necessary Amplify this message if you agree

item.title: @elonmusk: This is actually what is happening in Europe. Unconscionable evil.
item.description: This is actually what is happening in Europe. Unconscionable evil.

item.title: @elonmusk: What work Senator, like NOT passing the SAVE ACT?
item.description: What work Senator, like NOT passing the SAVE ACT?

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messa...
item.description: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messaging to customers in areas with no terrestrial service
